div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3 pb-2 border-bottom
card-header bg-light d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-2

div.div: Please select an employee to view today's visits.

div.p: Great job! All customer visits have been finished.

textarea.placeholder: Please provide a detailed reason for Switch the beat...

div.p: This is the first visit to this customer.
This customer hasn't placed any orders yet.

tr.td: No products found. Try a different search term.

div.p: This customer hasn't placed any orders yet.
This is the first visit to this customer.
This customer hasn't placed any confirmed orders yet.
Please wait while we get your current location
Please ensure location services are enabled.

textarea.placeholder: Add any additional notes about this visit...

div.p: Are you sure you want to end this beat?
